## Hygiene Checklist (required)
- [ ] Changes are low-risk and scoped
- [ ] No tracked `.DS_Store` / temp artifacts were introduced
- [ ] Logging/cron scripts are bounded (rotation/size guards where applicable)
- [ ] Quick-start/docs examples were verified for deterministic paths/commands

## Validation
- [ ] Relevant syntax/lint/smoke checks were run
- [ ] Script output includes clear PASS/FAIL verdicts where applicable
